mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_thing_model WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_thing_model(tenant_id, org_id, product_key, model_json, version, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{productKey}, #{modelJson}, #{version}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_thing_model SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
